lee.name: Lee Rang
lee.bio: Lee Rang is a premier digital illustrator at Skyball Studio. Specializing in high-concept character studies, atmospheric illustrations, and traditional outfit details, he crafts visually striking assets that bridge storytelling and play.

pritam.name: Pritam Kundu
pritam.bio: Pritam is a passionate 3D character and creature artist at Skyball Studio. He specializes in stylized character sculpting, dynamic action poses, and engine-optimized asset meshes designed for real-time play.

artworks.title: Fresya Pose Model
artworks.desc: Stylized 3D character sculpting, mapping, and anatomy posing.

artworks.title: FrogSpidey Concept Mesh
artworks.desc: Engine-optimized stylized creature asset mesh with hand-painted textures.

abhijeet.name: Abhijeet Ranjan
abhijeet.bio: Abhijeet is the lead 2D illustrator and character concept designer at Skyball Studio. His drawings focus on dramatic expressions, custom storyboard panels, and highly stylized illustration aesthetics.

artworks.title: Naruto Brosa Illustration
artworks.desc: Vibrant custom character group study with dynamic composition.

artworks.title: Naruto Brosa Detail Shot
artworks.desc: High-definition close-up shot focusing on visual strokes.

artworks.title: Stylized Portrait Study
artworks.desc: Character anatomy study exploring stylized portrait lighting.

pallavi.name: Pallavi Issrani
pallavi.bio: Pallavi is a senior 3D props and environment modeler at Skyball Studio. She is an expert in fantasy assets, industrial environmental props, stylized structures, and highly optimized game meshes.

artworks.title: Fantasy Cooking Pot Prop
artworks.desc: Stylized texturing, dynamic lighting, and low-poly game asset model.

artworks.title: Environment Asset Study
artworks.desc: Environment lighting mesh render exploring modular metallic mapping.

artworks.title: BHB Model Render
artworks.desc: High-poly organic asset mesh with baked ambient occlusion.
